case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. NEAL, ALICE ALLEN AKA ALICE ALLEN

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NEAL, ALICE ALLEN AKA ALICE ALLEN
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
